title: Delium
body:
[![delium.png](https://i.postimg.cc/rppfh6xx/delium.png)](https://postimg.cc/k2kN4pjg)


# Delium Was Taken!


![Research - B+](https://img.shields.io/badge/Research-B%2B-2ea44f)

![Status Delium: - Beta , Release](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status_Delium%3A-Beta_%2C_Release-orange)

![Status Ark - WIP](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=Status+Ark&message=WIP&color=red)

![Better Than: - Ice Cream](https://img.shields.io/badge/Better_Than%3A-Ice_Cream-white)

   **Delium** is a **Modpack** For **Arked Launcher** For Improving **Performance** and adding/providing Some **Q.O.L Features**. 

   [![doneinfo.png](https://i.postimg.cc/x8gYSDpY/doneinfo.png)](https://postimg.cc/q6tW8YdZ)

**Delium** Is Just Like every other performance mod pack with some QOL features. This Modpack is Specially Built for an Arked Launcher To Provide the **BEST Performance** Possible.

We are Thinking Of Add Some More Features and stuff you can always contact us on Discord.

[![staff.png](https://i.postimg.cc/SRQFd1SP/staff.png)](https://postimg.cc/tZcMC5Vd)

- Vihaan [Vhn2]
- Coder-soft [youwasted]

Your Suggestions / Ideas Will Be appreciated.

[![ark.png](https://i.postimg.cc/k5CjW6X1/ark.png)](https://postimg.cc/18WcQzFw)

Arked Launcher is a Minecraft Launcher Built With Python . and to provide the best performance we made this modpack for the Launcher.


[![faq.png](https://i.postimg.cc/NFXJ11Tn/faq.png)](https://postimg.cc/LgH3Sgxk)

#### Why On Modrinth Then? 

This Modpack was built to provide Fps and QOL features to Arked Launcher Users. This Modpack is here to also support the Modrinth Community and its users.


#### How Can I add Macros?

The Macros feature Is available in the 1.20.4 Release. you just have to set a key bind to open the menu. In 1.21 a key bind is already been set for you "N"

[![clients.png](https://i.postimg.cc/dVwHyZ0W/clients.png)](https://postimg.cc/nCSG8zB7)

You can use any Mod Clients you want here are some Recommended Ones.

#### [Neutron Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/neutronmc)
#### [Blaze Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/blazeclient)
#### [Brush Client](https://modrinth.com/mod/brush-client)

These Clients are made in mods so they can be used in **Delium Modpack**
